Metadata

Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7DC
Receive ID 7DD
Functional Addr 62
Functional Name FCAM
